title: VCs are betting billions on AI’s next wave, so why is OpenAI killing Sora?
snippet: When an 82-year-old Kentucky woman was offered $26 million from an AI company that wanted to build a data center on her land, she said no. Sure, that same company can try to rezone 2,000 acres nearby anyway, but as AI i…
contentText: When an 82-year-old Kentucky woman was offered $26 million from an AI company that wanted to build a data center on her land, she said no. Sure, that same company can try to rezone 2,000 acres nearby anyway, but as AI infrastructure stretches further into the real world, the real world is starting to push back.  That tension is everywhere […]

title: Sony increasing PlayStation 5 prices across all consoles, starting April 2 — PS5 and PS5 Digital Edition receive $100 hikes, while PS5 Pro will now sell for $900
snippet: PlayStation 5 consoles are once again receiving price hikes due to the global economic crisis. The disc and digital editions of the base console are $100 more expensive now, while the PS5 Pro is up $150, now costing $90…
contentText: PlayStation 5 consoles are once again receiving price hikes due to the global economic crisis. The disc and digital editions of the base console are $100 more expensive now, while the PS5 Pro is up $150, now costing $900. You still have a few days to secure these consoles before the new pricing comes into effect from April 2.

title: Armenian Banks to Jointly Loan Record $300 Million for AI Center
snippet: Armenian lenders signed a syndicated loan agreement to provide $300 million for the construction of Firebird AI’s data center, High-Tech Industry Minister Mkhitar Hayrapetyan said Friday, calling it the country’s first…
contentText: Armenian lenders signed a syndicated loan agreement to provide $300 million for the construction of Firebird AI’s data center, High-Tech Industry Minister Mkhitar Hayrapetyan said Friday, calling it the country’s first joint-financing project of that size.

title: Anthropic Could Go Public by October
snippet: Anthropic PBC is considering going public as soon as in October, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence company races with rival OpenAI Inc. to hold an initial public offering. Ed L…
contentText: Anthropic PBC is considering going public as soon as in October, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence company races with rival OpenAI Inc. to hold an initial public offering. Ed Ludlow of Bloomberg Tech reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Unity Up, Pernod-Ricard, Brown-Forman Rose on Merger Talks, Blue Owl Falls: Stock Movers
snippet: On this episode of Stock Movers: Unity Software (U) rose on a strong earnings forecast and news that it plans to sell its video-game publisher and close its advertising unit to focus on better business. Absolut owner Pe…
contentText: On this episode of Stock Movers: Unity Software (U) rose on a strong earnings forecast and news that it plans to sell its video-game publisher and close its advertising unit to focus on better business. Absolut owner Pernod-Ricard (RI FP) and Jack Daniel's maker Brown-Forman (BF/B) both rose on the news of a potential merger between France's largest alcohol producer and a top producer of American whisky. The companies are describing it as a 'merger of equals.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Rents Data Center Project Developed for Oracle, OpenAI

title: Prosus Said to Mull Selling 10% Delivery Hero Stake to Aspex
snippet: Delivery Hero SE’s biggest shareholder Prosus NV is considering selling a roughly 10% stake to Aspex Management, the delivery food company’s No. 2 holder, people familiar with the matter said, a move that would heap pre…
contentText: Delivery Hero SE’s biggest shareholder Prosus NV is considering selling a roughly 10% stake to Aspex Management, the delivery food company’s No. 2 holder, people familiar with the matter said, a move that would heap pressure on management to push ahead with asset sales.
